title: 14347 Home Office buildings where photography is allowed
body: "We have a received a request under the Freedom of Information Act 2000 for the following:   Please could you provide me with a current and up to date list of all government buildings, sites, facilities, and insulations both civil and military where photography is both prohibited and permitted (please only include information for locations/sites that are in the public domain). For the purposes of this request assume all photos would be taken from public areas and areas that the public have access to.   If photography is not permitted at a certain site, what act of law and what section of that act it is prohibited under and if these sites have signage stating this?  We released the following information on 28 May 2010  "
